use_cases: Displaying developer contribution history like GitHub's activity graph
Visualizing project engagement metrics over a 52-week period
Showing portfolio activity in developer profiles
Tracking team contribution patterns in analytics dashboards
ai_summary: A GitHub-inspired contribution calendar component that displays activity data over 364 days using a heatmap-style grid. Each cell represents a day colored by contribution intensity using a 5-level green color scale. The component processes contribution data and renders it in a week-by-week layout with Sunday start dates, providing developers and teams with a familiar visualization for tracking activity patterns and engagement over time.
